# Cambria's Bistro

> A family-owned Italian bistro in the heart of downtown Wadsworth, Ohio, where time-honored recipes meet the warmth of a neighborhood grill and pub.

## Business facts
- Business: Cambria's Bistro
- Location: Wadsworth, OH
- Phone: (330) 331-5357
- Service area: Wadsworth, OH, Medina County, OH
- Hours: Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday: 16:00-21:00 | Friday, Saturday: 12:00-21:00 | Sunday: 12:00-16:00

## Key pages
- https://cambriasbistro.com/
- https://cambriasbistro.com/menu/
- https://cambriasbistro.com/about/

- https://cambriasbistro.com/accessibility/

## Common questions
- What are Cambria's Bistro's hours? We’re open Tuesday through Thursday 4pm to 9pm, Friday and Saturday 12pm to 9pm, and Sunday 12pm to 4pm. We’re closed Mondays.
- Where is Cambria's Bistro located? We’re in the heart of downtown Wadsworth at 132 Main St, Wadsworth, OH 44281, with on-street and nearby lot parking.
- Do you take reservations? Yes. For reservations and large parties, call (330) 331-5282 or send a reservation request through our website and we’ll confirm your table.
- Do you host private events and offer catering? We do. Our private dining room hosts rehearsal dinners, showers, business gatherings and celebrations, and we cater off-site across the Wadsworth area. Call (330) 331-5282 to plan your event.
- Do you have vegetarian and gluten-free options? Yes. Many dishes are vegetarian, and you can substitute gluten-free penne on most pastas. Please tell your server about any allergies, as items may come in contact with common allergens.

## Contact
Call (330) 331-5357 for more information.
